title: US Treasury Yield Curve Spread Chart
description: Interactive visualization showing the spread between 10-year and 2-year Treasury rates, an important economic indicator for predicting recessions.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Yield Curve
Treasury Securities
Economic Indicators
Personal Finance
audience: High School Students, Economics Students, Investors
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of us treasury yield curve spread chart
Explore us treasury yield curve spread chart through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of us treasury yield curve spread chart to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on us treasury yield curve spread chart
